<s>[INST] Что делает ByteTokenizer? [/INST] ═════════════════════════════
#  2. БАЙТОВЫЙ ТОКЕНИЗАТОР (ВСЕ ЯЗЫКИ ЧЕРЕЗ UTF-8)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class ByteTokenizer:
    def encode(self, text: str) -> list:
        return list(text.encode('utf-8'))
    def decode(self, ids: list) -> str:
        return bytes([b for b in ids if b < 256]).decode('utf-8', errors='replace')

        ]

// SCHEDULER — параллельное выполнение событий Scratch
// ============================================================
class Scheduler {
  constructor(runtime) {
    this.runtime = runtime;
    this.abortController = null;
    this._handlers = { flags: [], broadcasts: {} };
    this._tasks = [];
    this._stopped = false;
  }

  reset() {
    this.stop();
    this._handlers = { flags: [], broadcasts: {} };
    this._tasks = [];
    this._stopped = false;
  }

// SCRATCH RUNTIME (Extended: Web Serial + Pen + Electronics)
// ============================================================
class ScratchRuntime {
  constructor(canvas) {
    this.canvas = canvas;
    this.ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    this.x = 0; this.y = 0; this.direction = 0;
    this.visible = true; this.running = false;

    // pen
    this.penIsDown = false;
    this.penColor = '#000000';
    this.penSize = 2;
    this.penLines = [];

    // hardware / seria </s>

 *     active: [id], highlighted: [id], operation: "search"|"insert" }
 * ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

class StepPlayer {
  constructor(canvas) {
    this.canvas = canvas;
    this.ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    this.steps = [];
    this.current = -1;
    this._running = false;
    this._aborted = false;
    this.onStep = null;
  }

  load(steps) {
    this.stop();
    this.steps = steps || [];
    this.current = -1;
    this._updateUI();
  }
 </s>
